## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes (if touching `apps/desktop/src-tauri`)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this is user-facing
- [ ] Conventional-commit PR title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
